features: Added global workflow action-lock helpers for completed Dispatch/Admin actions
Added busy/disabled button state to prevent double-click duplicate approval, assignment, proof review, and report publish actions
Guard approval rows and detail rail now remove approve/reject controls after approved or rejected status
Approved guard applications now route to the active Guards roster and select the approved guard when available
Rejected guard applications now remain in a rejected/locked state instead of staying in pending action mode
Pending Dispatch assignment now routes to Dispatch Board and removes the request from selected/checked pending queues after assignment
Proof Review now locks approved/rejected proof states and prevents rejected proof from being included in reports
Proof Review now prevents changing proof inclusion after a final report for that patrol is published
Report Builder now prevents duplicate publish for the same completed patrol and routes published reports directly to Report Archive
Reports Ready count now excludes completed patrols that already have a local or system published report
Preserved v3.0.64 server label QA fix and all v3.0.63 Report Archive features
